mapper.select:
SELECT T.REPORT_ID AS reportId, T.REPORT_CD AS reportCd, T.REPORT_NM AS reportNm, T.DESCRIPTION AS description, T.REPORT_TYPE AS reportType, T.DETAIL_PAGE AS detailPage FROM mhdb.TB_REPORT_INFO T WHERE 1=1 AND T.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer
AND T.USE_YN like concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
AND T.REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
AND T.REPORT_NM LIKE concat('%', #{reportNm}, '%')
ORDER BY T.REPORT_NM

SELECT C.ATTR_ID AS attrId, C.REPORT_ID AS reportId, C.TABLE_ID AS tableId, C.ATTR_ORDER AS attrOrder, C.ATTR_CD AS attrCd, C.ATTR_NM AS attrNm, C.ATTR_TYPE_CD AS attrTypeCd, C.ATTR_SIZE AS attrSize, C.DECIMAL_SIZE AS decimalSize, C.MDFY_INDEX AS mdfyIndex, C.ATTR_NULL_YN AS attrNullYn, C.USE_YN AS useYn, C.WHERE_YN AS whereYn, C.OUTPUT_PATH AS outputPath, C.DATE_TYPE_YN AS dateTypeYn, C.TIME_TYPE_YN AS timeTypeYn, C.DATETIME_YN AS datetimeYn, C.JOIN_YN AS joinYn, C.JOIN_ALIASS AS joinAliass, C.GROUP_BY_YN AS groupByYn, C.ORDER_BY_YN AS orderByYn, C.PREFIX AS prefix, C.SORT_INDEX AS sortIndex, C.WHERE_INDEX AS whereIndex, C.OUTPUT_INDEX AS outputIndex FROM mhdb.TB_REPORT_INFO I LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_REPORT_TABLE_ATTR C ON I.REPORT_ID = C.REPORT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND I.USE_YN = 'Y' AND I.REPORT_ID = #{reportId} AND I.SERVER_ID = #{serverId}::integer ORDER BY C.SORT_INDEX
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_REPORT_INFO (REPORT_CD, REPORT_NM, SERVER_ID, DESCRIPTION, REPORT_TYPE, DETAIL_PAGE, USE_YN) VALUES (#{report_cd}, #{report_nm}, #{serverId}, #{description}, #{report_type}, #{detail_page}, 'Y')
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_REPORT_INFO SET REPORT_CD = #{report_cd}, REPORT_NM = #{report_nm}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, REPORT_TYPE = #{report_type}, DETAIL_PAGE = #{detail_page} WHERE REPORT_ID = #{report_id}

UPDATE mhdb.TB_REPORT_ATTR SET ATTR_NM = #{attr_nm}, ATTR_TYPE_CD = #{attr_type_cd}, ATTR_SIZE = #{attr_size}, DECIMAL_SIZE = #{decimal_size}, ATTR_NULL_YN = #{attr_null_yn}, DATE_TYPE_YN = #{date_type_yn}, TIME_TYPE_YN = #{time_type_yn}, SORT_INDEX = #{sort_index}, WHERE_INDEX = #{where_index}, OUTPUT_INDEX = #{output_index} WHERE REPORT_ID = #{report_id} AND ATTR_CD = #{attr_cd}
